    <context>When working with KONE elevator systems version 1.0, you may encounter an issue where the context is not getting highlighted on hovering, but gets highlighted when hovering is removed. This issue can occur due to incorrect context configuration.</context>
    <prereq>To resolve the context highlighting issue, ensure that you have:
      <itemize>
        <item>Access to the KONE elevator system version 1.0 configuration settings</item>
        <item>A basic understanding of context configuration in KONE elevator systems</item>
      </itemize>
    </prereq>
    <steps>
      <step><cmd>Determine the cause of the context highlighting issue by checking the context configuration in the KONE elevator system version 1.0.</cmd></step>
      <step><cmd>Verify that the context is properly defined and configured in the KONE elevator system version 1.0.</cmd></step>
      <step><cmd>Check for any conflicts or overrides that may be causing the context highlighting issue.</cmd></step>
      <step><cmd>Update the context configuration as needed to resolve the highlighting issue.</cmd></step>
    </steps>
    <result>The context highlighting issue is resolved, and the context is properly highlighted when hovering in the KONE elevator system version 1.0. You should now be able to:
      <itemize>
        <item>Hover over the context and see it highlighted correctly</item>
        <item>Remove hovering and see the context highlighting removed</item>
      </itemize>
    </result>
    <postreq>Verify that the context highlighting is working as expected in the KONE elevator system version 1.0 by testing the following scenarios:
      <itemize>
        <item>Hovering over the context and verifying it is highlighted</item>
        <item>Removing hovering and verifying the context highlighting is removed</item>
      </itemize>
    </postreq>
  </taskbody>
</task>
